name: Rogers Hydraulic & Equipment Services — Brand Tokens
description: Portable design tokens for designers, sign shops, and print vendors. Mirrors src/config/brand.ts.

graphite.role: Primary dark — trucks, uniforms, page background

hivis-lime.role: LEAD accent — CTAs, truck stripes, icon strokes (use sparingly)

white-smoke.role: Light background / body text on dark

logo.primary: Two-tone wordmark knocked out of a graphite block with a hi-vis keyline (Hilti/DeWalt tool-brand language)
logo.detail: ROGERS (white) + HYDRAULIC (lime), Oswald Bold; & EQUIPMENT SERVICES below in Oswald Regular, tracked
logo.icon: RH monogram (R white, H lime) in a lime-keyline block
logo.tagline: On-Site. After Hours. Back to Work.

do: Wordmark knocked out of a graphite block with a lime keyline
Thick strokes, sharp corners, high contrast
dont: No emblem, mascot, or coupling icon
No Texas outline, stars, or flags
No red (that is the competitors' lane)
No gradients, bevels, or drop shadows on the mark
No cowboy/western styling or distressed sports fonts
